_comment: ADG model-selection policy. Editable policy-as-code (like context-profiles.yaml / guardrails.json), NOT generated provenance. The orchestrator selects an ABSTRACT capability TIER from effort (lane) + risk + role; the tier->model rows below are the only place provider model IDs live, so the policy stays provider-neutral and the rest of ADG never hardcodes a model name. Update these rows as providers ship models; nothing else changes.

economy._use: L0/L1 mechanical work: rename, format, mirror edits, mechanical workers.

balanced._use: L2 normal feature work; most workers.

frontier-reasoning._use: L3/L4, planning, judge panels, ambiguous design, sensitive risk classes.

selection._comment: Floors only RAISE the tier; nothing here can pull an item below its lane tier. Mechanical -> economy is expressed by classifying the work as L0/L1, not by a downgrade key, so a risk floor can never be undercut.

effort._comment: reasoning effort per lane, mapped onto the Claude Agent SDK AgentDefinition.effort scale (low|medium|high|xhigh|max) and OpenAI model_settings reasoning effort.
